title: संपादकीय : २६ जून २०२६ – एवढी हिंमत येते तरी कुठून?
description: माणसाच्या मनातील संवेदनशीलता, नैतिक मूल्ये आणि कायद्याचा धाक किती टोकाच्या पातळीवर जाऊन संपू शकतो, याचे एक मन विषण्ण करणारे आणि समाजमानाला पोखरून काढणारे वास्तव पुण्यातून समोर आले आहे. लोहगडावर ४०० फूट खोल दरीत ढकलून केतन अग्रवाल या २५ वर्षीय तरुणाचा करण्यात आलेला खून तरुण पिढीतील वाढती हिंस्र प्रवृत्ती, नात्यांमधील संवादाचा अभाव आणि टोकाचा आत्मकेंद्रितपणा दाखवणारा […]
content:
माणसाच्या मनातील संवेदनशीलता, नैतिक मूल्ये आणि कायद्याचा धाक किती टोकाच्या पातळीवर जाऊन संपू शकतो, याचे एक मन विषण्ण करणारे आणि समाजमानाला पोखरून काढणारे वास्तव पुण्यातून समोर आले आहे. लोहगडावर ४०० फूट खोल दरीत ढकलून केतन अग्रवाल या २५ वर्षीय तरुणाचा करण्यात आलेला खून तरुण पिढीतील वाढती हिंस्र प्रवृत्ती, नात्यांमधील संवादाचा अभाव आणि टोकाचा आत्मकेंद्रितपणा दाखवणारा एक सामाजिक आजार आहे. ज्या मुलीशी लग्न ठरले होते, तिनेच कथित प्रियकराच्या मदतीने रचलेला हा क्रूर कट केवळ धक्कादायक नसून, ‘एखाद्या व्यक्तीचा जीव घेण्यासाठी एवढी हिंमत येते कुठून?’ असा गंभीर प्रश्न उभा करणारा आहे. घटनेचे गांभीर्य आणि क्रूरता पाहिल्यास लक्षात येते की, आरोपी मुलगी सिया गोयल आणि तिचा प्रियकर चेतन चौधरी यांनी अतिशय थंड डोयाने या हत्येचा कट रचला. लग्न ठरलेल्या केतनसोबत लग्न करण्याची सियाची इच्छा नव्हती. कोणत्याही सुजाण आणि सुशिक्षित समाजात अशावेळी लग्नाला सरळ नकार देणे हा सोपामार्ग उपलब्ध असतो.



आधुनिक काळात विवाह जुळणे आणि ते न पटल्यास तुटणे या गोष्टी नव्या नाहीत. परंतु आपल्या कुटुंबासमोर किंवा समाजासमोर ‘नाही’ म्हणण्याचे साधे धाडस दाखवण्याऐवजी, एका निरपराध तरुणाचा जीव घेण्याचा मार्ग निवडला जाणे, ही मानसिकताच विकृत आहे. केवळ प्रेमसंबंधातील अडथळा दूर करण्यासाठी एका उमद्या तरुणाला थेट मृत्यूच्या दरीत ढकलून देणे क्रौर्याची परिसीमा गाठणारे आहे. लोहगड किल्ल्यावरून पाय घसरून केतनचा अपघात झाल्याचा बनाव सुरुवातीला रचण्यात आला होता. मात्र, पुणे ग्रामीण पोलिसांच्या सखोल तपासाने आणि सीसीटीव्ही फुटेजच्या विश्लेषणाने हा कट उघडकीस आणला. प्रचंड उष्णतेच्या वातावरणात अंगावर हुडी चढवून, कान आणि चेहरा झाकून फिरणार्‍या चेतन चौधरीच्या संशयास्पद हालचाली पोलिसांच्या नजरेतून सुटू शकल्या नाहीत. विज्ञानाने आणि तंत्रज्ञानाने आज गुन्हेगारांना पकडणे सोपे केले आहे, तरीही ‘आपण कायद्याच्या हातावर तुरी देऊन निसटू शकू’ हा जो अवाजवी आत्मविश्वास आजच्या गुन्हेगारांमध्ये दिसतो, तो कायद्याच्या अंमलबजावणीतील त्रुटींमुळे की सामाजिक संस्कारांच्या अभावामुळे, याचा विचार करण्याची वेळ आली आहे.



या संपूर्ण प्रकरणात सर्वात मोठा प्रश्न हा उपस्थित होतो की, तरुणाईमध्ये कायद्याची भीती पूर्णपणे संपली आहे का? कोणत्याही गुन्ह्याचा परिणाम हा केवळ तात्कालीक नसतो. आज हे दोन्ही मुख्य आरोपी पोलीस कोठडीत आहेत आणि त्यांचे संपूर्ण आयुष्य, करिअर आता अंध:कारमय झाले आहे. हा गुन्हा करताना त्यांनी स्वतःच्या भविष्याचा, आपल्या वृद्ध माता-पित्यांच्या अब्रूचा आणि सर्वात मुख्य म्हणजे ज्या केतनचा त्यांनी जीव घेतला, त्याच्या कुटुंबाच्या कधीही न भरून निघणार्‍या दुःखाचा विचार का केला नाही? क्षणिक स्वार्थ आणि आंधळ्या प्रेमापोटी माणूस इतका विवेकशून्य कसा होऊ शकतो? वाढत्या वयासोबत येणारी परिपक्वता जर अशा विकृत कृत्यांमध्ये बदलत असेल, तर आपल्या शिक्षण पद्धतीवर आणि कौटुंबिक संगोपनावर मोठे प्रश्नचिन्ह निर्माण होते. आजच्या डिजिटल आणि वेगवान युगात नात्यांमधील प्रगल्भता कमी होताना दिसत आहे. चित्रपट, सोशल मीडिया आणि आभासी जगातील गुन्हेगारी विश्वाचा प्रभाव तरुण मनांवर खोलवर पडत आहे. ‘हवे ते मिळवण्यासाठी कोणत्याही थराला जाणे’ ही जी वृत्ती आज समाजात फोफावत आहे, त्याचेच हे हिंस्त्र फलित आहे. सियाने आपल्या वाढदिवसाच्या आदल्या दिवशी केतनला लोहगडावर नेण्याचा हट्ट धरला, हे दाखवते की मनात हत्येचा कट शिजत असतानाही ती चेहर्‍यावर प्रेमाचा खोटा मुखवटा घालून वावरत होती. हा थंड रक्ताचा क्रूरपणा अधिक भयावह आहे.



या समस्येवर उपाय शोधताना समाजाने आणि पालकांनी अंतर्मुख होण्याची गरज आहे. मुलांना केवळ भौतिक सुविधा देणे म्हणजे संगोपन नव्हे. त्यांना ‘नकार’ पचवण्याची ताकद देणे, नात्यांमध्ये प्रामाणिकपणाचे महत्त्व पटवून देणे आणि कायदेशीर परिणामांची जाणीव करून देणे गरजेचे आहे. जर एखाद्या मुलाला किंवा मुलीला विवाह मान्य नसेल, तर त्यांनी तो आपल्या कुटुंबाकडे स्पष्टपणे मांडला पाहिजे आणि पालकांनीही मुलांच्या मताचा आदर करत त्यांना त्यांचे निर्णय घेण्याचे स्वातंत्र्य दिले पाहिजे. नकार देण्याचे भय जेव्हा मनात निर्माण होते, तेव्हाच असे गुप्त आणि हिंस्त्र कट रचले जातात. या घटनेतून धडा घेऊन, भविष्यात एकाही ‘केतन’चा असा दुर्दैवी बळी जाणार नाही आणि कायद्याचा वचक समाजात कायम राहील, यासाठी पोलीस प्रशासनाने या गुन्हेगारांना कठोरतम शिक्षा मिळवून देणे हेच आता योग्य न्यायाचे पाऊल ठरेल.

title: Nims Notificaion | టిమ్స్‌ కోసం నిమ్స్‌ నోటిఫికేషన్‌.. దశా దిశ లేని టిమ్స్‌ నిర్వహణ..అయోమయంలో సిబ్బంది
description: Nims Notificaion | కేసీఆర్‌ సర్కార్‌ ప్రతిష్ఠాత్మకంగా నిర్మించిన తెలంగాణ ఇన్‌స్టిట్యూట్‌ ఆఫ్‌ మెడికల్‌ సైన్సెస్‌(టిమ్స్‌) నిర్వహణ నేటి ప్రభుత్వం పుణ్యమా అని దశా దిశ లేకుండా పోయింది.
content:
Nims Notificaion |హైదరాబాద్‌ సిటీబ్యూరో, జూన్‌ 25 (నమస్తే తెలంగాణ): కేసీఆర్‌ సర్కార్‌ ప్రతిష్ఠాత్మకంగా నిర్మించిన తెలంగాణ ఇన్‌స్టిట్యూట్‌ ఆఫ్‌ మెడికల్‌ సైన్సెస్‌(టిమ్స్‌) నిర్వహణ నేటి ప్రభుత్వం పుణ్యమా అని దశా దిశ లేకుండా పోయింది.
నిమ్స్‌ తరహాలోనే స్వయం ప్రతిపత్తి హోదాతో టిమ్స్‌ను ఏర్పాటు చేసి, ప్రజలకు మెరుగైన సూపర్‌ స్పెషాలిటీ వైద్యసేవలు అందించాలనే సంకల్పంతో నిర్మించిన టిమ్స్‌ ఇప్పట్లో అందుబాటులోకి వచ్చే పరిస్థితులు కనిపించడంలేదు. ఇదిగో ప్రారంభిస్తున్నాం, అదిగో ప్రారంభిస్తున్నామంటూ ఊదరగొడుతున్న కాంగ్రెస్‌ సర్కార్‌ టిమ్స్‌ ప్రారంభాన్ని గత రెండు నెలలుగా వాయిదా వేస్తూ వస్తున్నది. మరో విచిత్రమేంటంటే దవాఖానలో ఓపీ సేవలపై ఇప్పటికే ట్రయల్‌ రన్‌ ప్రారంభించిన సర్కార్‌కు అసలు టిమ్స్‌ నిర్వహణ బాధ్యతలు ఎవరి పరిధిలోకి వస్తాయో స్పష్టత లేకపోవడం గమనార్హం.
డీఎంఈ పరిధిలో నుంచి ఫ్యాకల్టీ…
వెయ్యి పడకల సామర్థ్యం గల టిమ్స్‌లో వైద్య సిబ్బంది, టెక్నికల్‌, నర్సింగ్‌ తదితర సిబ్బంది కోసం ఇప్పటి వరకు రెగ్యులర్‌ రిక్రూట్‌మెంట్‌ చేపట్టకపోవడం గమనార్హం. వైద్యులు, ఫ్యాకల్టీని నగరంలోని ఉస్మానియా, గాంధీ, నిలోఫర్‌, ఎర్రగడ్డ ఛాతి దవాఖాన, మానసిక రోగుల దవాఖాన, నిమ్స్‌, ఇతర టీచింగ్‌ హాస్పిటల్స్‌ నుంచి మొత్తం 180 మందిని టిమ్స్‌కు డిప్యుటేషన్‌పై వేశారు. అదే క్రమంలో నర్సింగ్‌, ఇతర సిబ్బందిని సైతం ఆయా టీచింగ్‌ హాస్పిటల్స్‌ నుంచి కొంత మందిని టిమ్స్‌కు కేటాయించారు. ప్రస్తుతం టిమ్స్‌ పర్యవేక్షణ అంతా డీఎంఈ పరిధిలో కొనసాగుతున్నది. అయితే టిమ్స్‌లో ఉద్యోగుల నిర్వహణ కోసం కనీసం హెచ్‌ఆర్‌ను నియమించకపోవడం, ఇప్పటి వరకు ఒక పరిపాలనాధికారిని నియమించకపోవడం టిమ్స్‌ నిర్వహణకు అద్ధం పడుతున్నది.
నిమ్స్‌ పరిధిలో ఉద్యోగాల భర్తీ
డీఎంఈ పర్యవేక్షణలో ఉన్న టిమ్స్‌కు ఉద్యోగాల భర్తీ బాధ్యతలను మాత్రం నిమ్స్‌కు అప్పగిస్తూ నోటిఫికేషన్‌ జారీచేశారు. దీంతో అసలు ఎవరు ఎవరికింద పనిచేస్తున్నారో అర్ధం కాని పరిస్థితి నెలకొన్నది. పర్యవేక్షణేమో డీఎంఈ పరిధిలో, కాంట్రాక్ట్‌ పద్ధతిన ఉద్యోగ నియామకాలేమో నిమ్స్‌ పరిధిలో చేపడుతున్నారు. అంటే టిమ్స్‌లో పనిచేయాల్సిన టెక్నికల్‌, అడ్మినిస్ట్రేషన్‌, ఇతర విభాగాలకు చెందిన ఉద్యోగులు నిమ్స్‌లో భర్తీ కావాలి. ఆ తరువాత వారిని నిమ్స్‌ యాజమాన్యం టిమ్స్‌కు సంవత్సరం కాలం పాటు కేటాయిస్తుంది. ఈ క్రమంలో సతన్‌నగర్‌ టిమ్స్‌లో పనిచేయడానికి మొత్తం 122మంది నాన్‌ క్లినికల్‌ సిబ్బంది, 31మంది మెడికల్‌ ఫ్యాకల్టీని కాంట్రాక్ట్‌ పద్ధతిన రిక్రూట్‌ చేసేందుకు నిమ్స్‌ నోటిఫికేషన్‌ జారీచేసింది. ఎంపికైన సిబ్బందికి నిమ్స్‌ యాజమాన్యమే వేతనాలు చెల్లిస్తుంది. అయితే వైద్యులు డీఎంఈ పరిధిలో నుంచి, ఇతర సిబ్బంది నిమ్స్‌ నుంచి కేటాయించడం వల్ల పాలనాపరంగా, సాంకేతికపరంగా పలు ఇబ్బందులు ఎదురవుతాయని అధికారులు, సిబ్బంది మండిపడుతున్నారు.
టిమ్స్‌ సేవలు ఇప్పట్లో ప్రశ్నార్థకమే!
బీఆర్‌ఎస్‌ ప్రభుత్వం ప్రతిష్ఠాత్మకంగా నిర్మించిన సనత్‌నగర్‌ టిమ్స్‌ సేవలు ఇప్పట్లో ప్రజలకు అందుబాటులోకి రావడం ప్రశ్నార్థకమనే విమర్శలు వినిపిస్తున్నాయి. దవాఖానలో ట్రయల్‌ రన్‌ ప్రారంభించి నెల రోజులు గడుస్తున్నా ఇప్పటికీ అక్కడ అవసరమైన కనీసం సిబ్బంది లేరని, వైద్య పరికరాలు, సరైన మౌలిక సదుపాయాలు, ఆపరేషన్‌ థియేటర్లు వంటివి ఇంకా పూర్తిస్థాయిలో ఏర్పాటు కాలేదని తెలుస్తున్నది. దీనికి తోడు వైద్యులు, నర్సింగ్‌ సిబ్బంది, టెక్నికల్‌, అడ్మినిస్ట్రేటివ్‌ తదితర కీలక విభాగాలకు చెందిన అధికారులు, సిబ్బంది నియామకం కూడా పూర్తికాకపోవడంతో సనత్‌నగర్‌ టిమ్స్‌ ఇప్పట్లో అందుబాటులోకి వచ్చే అవకాశాలు కనిపించడం లేదన్న వాదనలు వినిపిస్తున్నాయి.

title: Japan and Sweden draw takes both into last 32
description: Daizen Maeda's smart finish to Japan's team goal is cancelled out by Anthony Elanga's long-range strike as Sweden fight back in a 1-1 draw that takes both sides through to the World Cup knockout stages.

title: 'Ananthan Kaadu' mints Rs 65 lakh India Net

title: Retiree paid tax on exempt income, wins case in ITAT
Venezuela Earthquake Horror: Survivors Describe 'Ground Moving Like Sea'
description: On Wednesday, Venezuela experienced two major earthquakes, measuring magnitudes of 7.2 and 7.5, leading to significant destruction from La Guaira to Caracas. Panic ensued among residents, many of whom spent the night outdoors
content: Two powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela in quick succession on Wednesday, causing widespread destruction from the coastal state of La Guaira to the capital, Caracas. As of Thursday, at least 235 people had been killed and thousands more injured after the earthquakes, which measured magnitudes of 7.2 and 7.5. Buildings collapsed as the ground shook violently, trapping people beneath rubble and prompting large-scale rescue operations. Residents Describe Panic People across the Caracas metropolitan area described scenes of fear as the earthquakes struck and aftershocks continued through the night. "I was at home, and the house began shaking violently. At first, I thought it was the wind coming through the windows, but when I looked outside and saw that it was shaking too, I grabbed onto the doorway and started to pray," 52-year-old Maria Gonzalez told Al Jazeera. Gonzalez, who lives in Chacao on the outskirts of Caracas, said several items fell inside her home during the earthquake. Although her apartment building was not damaged, she chose to remain in Plaza Altamira, an open public space, as more than 10 aftershocks rattled the city. "I stayed out on the street until three in the morning because I would leave my home whenever aftershocks hit. People were having nervous breakdowns and crying," she said.            https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=joZEs2qQUxA Marian Rieber, a health journalist in Caracas, told Newsweek she was taking her dog downstairs when the earthquake struck. "At 6:05 in the afternoon, I went to take the dog down the stairs, floor two, and when I went down, everything began to move from left to right very strongly as if it were the tide of a beach," she said. "But we were on the concrete." She described the sound as "deafening", saying metal, glass and concrete groaned simultaneously while neighbours screamed. "This was very long, very long," she said. "I was attached to my dog, and I felt that the floor kept moving, then the aftershocks came." With mobile phone service disrupted in parts of Caracas, many residents spent the night outdoors. "Most Venezuelans have slept in the car doing vigils, taking care of each other," Rieber said. "Taking the dogs where we go... unfortunately, this is a tragedy, to which we are not used and we are not prepared."        Altamira and Los Palos Grandes Altamira was among the worst-affected areas of Caracas. According to AFP, a 22-storey building collapsed completely in the neighbourhood. Residents described clouds of dust rising between buildings as volunteers searched through the rubble with flashlights while people called out the names of missing relatives. A Guardian reporter said at least three buildings had collapsed in Altamira, with some people believed trapped beneath the debris. Outside one building, a person was seen weeping and calling for a grandmother feared to be inside while emergency workers and volunteers searched for survivors. Three people were killed in the Baruta district after two buildings collapsed, according to the district's mayor, Reuters reported.            https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QgDUkd0h-1gThe mayor of Chacao said one person had died, four buildings had collapsed and 22 people had been taken to hospital. The JW Marriott hotel, which has served as the United States' unofficial embassy since January's military intervention, was also badly shaken. Videos posted on social media appeared to show guests fleeing as the building shook. La Guaira and Catia La Mar La Guaira, home to the country's main international airport, also suffered extensive damage. The airport sustained what authorities described as "severe damage", with sections of the roof collapsing onto passengers attempting to flee. Acting President Delcy Rodríguez said the airport was closed immediately after the earthquake. Metro and rail services were also suspended.        Imágenes aéreas de La Guaira. Terremoto en #Venezuela. No para de sorprender tanta tragedia. 🚨🆘‼️ pic.twitter.com/8tV85HNrle— Cristian Crespo F. 🇨🇺 (@cristiancrespoj) June 25, 2026She said rescue teams from other parts of the country were being deployed to La Guaira. Nearby Catia La Mar was also heavily affected. Reports indicated that more than a dozen large buildings, including beachfront hotels and residential towers, had collapsed, with the Playa Grande neighbourhood among the hardest hit. "Dozens of buildings have collapsed there … and we are currently carrying out intensive rescue operations to save lives," Rodríguez said. Damage beyond the Capital The epicentre of the earthquakes was located west of Caracas near the coastal town of Morón in Carabobo state. In Naguanagua, several building walls collapsed, while residents in Valencia, the state capital, gathered outside damaged buildings amid fears of further aftershocks. Emergency crews continued rescue operations across affected areas as authorities assessed the full scale of the destruction.

title: Ecuador Coach Climbs Stands to Celebrate Upset Over Germany - WATCH
description: Ecuador achieved a stunning 2-1 victory over Germany in a crucial FIFA World Cup match, ensuring their progression to the knockout stage. This win marks a significant upset in the tournament, although Germany still topped Group E.
content: La Tri shocked four-time winners Germany with a 2-1 victory in New York New Jersey Stadium in the USA on Friday, ensuring Ecuador's survival in the FIFA World Cup 2026. Leroy Sane gave Germany the lead early in the crucial match, but goals from Angulo and Plata helped Ecuador make a remarkable comeback in the match. Ecuador coach Sebastian Beccacece jumped and climbed on to the stand to embrace his family after Plata finished La Tri's comeback against the Mannaschaft.Sebastian Beccacece's CelebrationsSebastian Beccacece marked the upset over Germany with an unforgettable World Cup celebration. As one of the top eight third-place team, La Tri's 2-1 victory in New Jersey ensures their position in the round of 32. At the last whistle, manager Beccacece just went crazy. After celebrating with his staff in a huddle, he headed straight for the seats behind the dugout and started climbing the stand.Beccacece scaled a barrier where his loved ones seemed to be seated, gave them a group hug, and held on to them tightly. While the Ecuadorian players celebrated together, fans in other parts of the MetLife were shedding happy tears, with some still displaying symptoms of utter shock. Chelsea star Moises Caicedo lied flat on his back before rising to his knees and pointed up into the sky.Germany Take Early LeadDespite the loss, Germany's two victories over Curacao and Ivory Coast in their first two games helped them top Group E with six points.Leroy Sane gave Germany the lead in just the second minute of the game. After a move that caused controversy because of Aleksandar Pavlovic's lifted boot during the build-up, the winger composedly reached the back of the net. The four-time world champions gained an early lead as the referee upheld the goal in spite of the objections.Ecuador's ComebackEcuador reacted quickly, leveling the score in just seven minutes. La Tri regained parity with a fantastic long-range goal from Jhonny Angulo, who cut in from the left and past Manuel Neuer from outside the penalty area.The teams were tied 1-1 going into halftime with everything still up for grabs in an important Group E match. Gonzalo Plata took advantage of a well-worked corner that was sent to the near post in the 77th minute, which proved to be the game-changing moment. The Ecuadorian supporters were ecstatic when Plata touched the ball before Neuer and poked it into the net.Ecuador secured a historic victory over Germany by remaining resolute for the rest of the game. The outcome is the biggest upset of the competition thus far and guaranteed their spot in the knockout stages while maintaining their World Cup campaign. Germany nevertheless won Group E in spite of the loss.

title: Dixon Technologies in focus: DAM Capital reiterates ‘BUY’, sees H2FY27 momentum led by Vivo JV and exports push - Check target price
description: DAM Capital expects Dixon’s base volumes to remain stable in the near term, with a sharper growth trajectory emerging only once incremental drivers kick in.
content: Dixon Technologies: DAM Capital has reiteriated its bullish stance on the contract manufacturer, maintaining a ‘BUY’ rating with a target price of Rs 13,500. The brokerage expects a pickup in growth momentum from the second half of FY27, supported by new partnerships, policy tailwinds, and expansion into new segments. At the current market price of Rs 12,013, the target implies a potential upside of about 12 per cent.DAM Capital expects Dixon’s base volumes to remain stable in the near term, with a sharper growth trajectory emerging only once incremental drivers kick in. The report notes that “Dixon’s base vols in FY27E are expected to remain flat at 32–33mn while its incremental growth hinges on Vivo JV (10mn vols in H2FY27E) which we believe is round the corner.”Policy tailwinds and export pushIn addition to the JV, DAM Capital highlights the role of policy support and shifting industry dynamics in strengthening Dixon’s outlook. According to the report, “expected PLI 2.0 (focussed exports/value add) and brand’s increasing preference for Indian EMS vendors bodes well for Dixon’s volumes hereon.”The brokerage believes these trends could “drive exports for its anchor customer coupled with new customer adds and potential shift in vols from competitors,” creating an additional growth lever, even if its full impact is yet to be seen.On the back of these factors, DAM Capital has built in strong volume growth assumptions for the coming years, stating that this visibility “gives confidence for 43.5mn smartphone vols in FY27 and 58mn (2% upgrade) for FY28,” though it cautions that “scale up and approvals remains key.”Margins to stay under pressure in near termDespite the positive volume outlook, the report flags near-term margin pressures stemming from delays in component-related initiatives. DAM Capital notes that “while component plans were delayed, it remains on track to start delivering meaningfully in FY28E, implying near-term margin pressures (baked in our est at 3.2 per cent – 60bps decline yoy).”New growth avenues beyond smartphonesLooking beyond the core mobile segment, the brokerage sees multiple optionalities opening up for Dixon. It points out a “strong pick up in IT/telecom and potential entry into EMS and servers/optical transceivers” as additional engines of growth over the medium term. These newer verticals are expected to diversify revenue streams and reduce reliance on the highly competitive smartphone assembly business.Strong earnings outlook remains intactDespite short-term headwinds, the brokerage remains confident about Dixon’s earnings trajectory. It expects the company to deliver robust growth metrics, stating that “Dixon delivering its component plans with gradual scale up in volumes… should drive 50 per cent EPS CAGR over FY26–28E (excl one-time gain in FY26), over 30 per cent RoCE, and healthy FCF.”Dixon currently trades at around 40 times FY28 earnings, but DAM Capital believes there is scope for further re-rating. The report notes that “higher certainty of Vivo JV, PLI 2.0 and scale up ex-mobiles along with inorganic acqns for PCBA will act as key positive triggers for re-rating.”(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money related decisions.)

title: Bank Holiday Today: SBI, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank branches shut in multiple cities on Muharram; UPI, ATM services continue
description: Bank Holiday on June 26: Bank branches in several Indian cities are closed today for Muharram, while digital banking, ATMs, NEFT, IMPS, and RTGS remain active. Stock markets are also expected to remain closed.
content: Bank Holiday Today: Banking operations across several Indian cities are affected today (June 26) as branches remain closed on account of Muharram, marking the Islamic New Year and the observance of Ashura, one of the most significant days in the Islamic calendar.According to the Reserve Bank of India holiday calendar, bank branches will remain shut in select locations, while digital banking services continue without disruption.Cities where bank branches are closed todayBanking services at physical branches are not available in the following cities:Agartala, Aizawl, Belapur, Bengaluru, Bhopal, Chennai, Hyderabad, Jammu, Kanpur, Kolkata, Lucknow, Mumbai, Nagpur, New Delhi, Patna, Raipur, Ranchi, Srinagar, and Vijayawada.Banking services remain operational digitallyDespite branch closures, core banking operations remain accessible. Customers can continue using internet banking, mobile banking apps, Unified Payments Interface (UPI), and ATMs for withdrawals, transfers, and bill payments.Routine branch-based services such as cash deposits, account opening, loan applications, passbook updates, and large-value over-the-counter transactions are unavailable during the holiday.However, digital rails, including NEFT, IMPS, and RTGS remain operational for online transactions, though branch-initiated requests will follow holiday schedules.Cities where banks remain openIn contrast, banking operations continue as usual in several other cities, including Ahmedabad, Bhubaneswar, Chandigarh, Dehradun, Guwahati, Gangtok, Imphal, Itanagar, Jaipur, Kochi, Kohima, Panaji, Shillong, Shimla, and Thiruvananthapuram.However, readers should note that bank holidays in India are determined by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) based on national, regional, and festival calendars. Muharram observance typically results in selective closures across states, rather than a nationwide shutdown of banking services.Digital banking infrastructure continues to ensure uninterrupted financial access even during physical branch closures.Stock Market Holiday TodayEquity markets in India are expected to remain closed today. The National Stock Exchange (NSE) and the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) will remain closed for three days as June 26 falls on a Friday, followed by the regular weekend. Trading will resume on Monday, June 29.There will be no trading in the equity, equity derivatives, currency derivatives, Securities Lending and Borrowing (SLB), Electronic Gold Receipts (EGR), NDS-RST and Tri-Party Repo segments during the holiday. While the Multi-Commodity Exchange (MCX), however, will observe only a partial trading holiday and will resume in the evening session from 5:00 pm until 11:30 pm or 11:55 pm.Read More: NSE, BSE closed on June 26 for Muharram; equity markets set for 3-day suspension

title: Oil edges up from $70; Brent holds near $75 amid West Asia tensions
description: Oil Price: Brent crude was trading at USD 75.01 a barrel, down marginally by USD 0.25 or 0.33 per cent, while U.S. benchmark West Texas Intermediate crude stood at USD 71.61, slipping USD 0.31 or 0.43 per cent in choppy trade.
content: Oil prices edged higher on Friday, with Brent crude hovering near the USD 75 per barrel mark, as geopolitical developments in West Asia added a layer of uncertainty to already mixed global market signals.Brent crude was trading at USD 75.01 a barrel, down marginally by USD 0.25 or 0.33 per cent, while U.S. benchmark West Texas Intermediate crude stood at USD 71.61, slipping USD 0.31 or 0.43 per cent in choppy trade. Despite the slight declines in benchmark prices, the broader tone in the market remained supported by rising geopolitical risk premiums.The latest trigger came from escalating rhetoric around the Strait of Hormuz, a critical artery for global oil shipments. Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has reportedly rejected a newly proposed shipping route through the strait, arguing that it was established without Tehran’s approval. The IRGC warned that vessels must adhere to corridors designated by Iran, raising concerns about potential enforcement action against ships that fail to comply.The Strait of Hormuz handles roughly a fifth of the world’s oil trade, and any disruption or perceived threat to navigation tends to reverberate quickly across energy markets. U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio struck a firm tone on Iran, stating that the country continues to be led by what he described as “radical clerics.” Rubio indicated that Washington retains “multiple options” if diplomatic talks with Tehran fail, underscoring the fragile nature of ongoing negotiations.Rubio also dismissed discussions around implementing tolls or fees for passage through the Strait of Hormuz, calling such proposals unworkable. Fees and tolls are effectively the same thing, he said, reiterating that the U.S. would not support any arrangement that could hinder maritime flow or undermine Gulf allies. He added that recent engagements with Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) nations were constructive and reaffirmed regional cooperation.While geopolitical tensions offered some support to crude prices, broader financial market signals remained mixed. On Wall Street, the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbed to fresh record highs, buoyed by gains in industrial and financial stocks. However, the tech-heavy Nasdaq index faced renewed selling pressure, reflecting investor caution around high-growth sectors.Oil Price HistoryOil prices have remained highly volatile, with concerns mounting over potential supply disruptions at the Strait of Hormuz, a critical maritime chokepoint that handles nearly 20 per cent of global oil flows, heightening inflation risks for economies worldwide.Earlier on April 30, Brent climbed near a multi-year high of USD 126 a barrel, gaining nearly 7 percent intraday, extending the momentum built on the back of a strong surge earlier. Before, on March 9, Brent crude surged over 27 per cent to trade at a multi-year high of USD 119 a barrel amid escalating West Asia tensions.(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money related decisions.)

Women's T20 World Cup 2026: India-W return to winning ways with a 5-wicket win over Bangladesh-W
description: India-W attained a 5-wicket win over Bangladesh-W in Women's T20 World Cup 2026 on Thursday. Shafali Verma emerged as the standout performer for India.
content: After enduring a painful defeat against South Africa on Sunday, India-W have returned to winning ways in fine fashion, beating Bangladesh-W by 5 wickets at Old Trafford on Thursday in the Women's T20 World Cup 2026. Batting first, Ban-W posted a par total of 136 for 8. In reply, Ind-W chased down the total inside 17 overs. Shafali Verma emerged as the standout performer for India with a 34-ball 53.Shafali Verma bludgeoned the Bangladesh attack with a 34-ball 53 to set up a five-wicket win for India in the Women’s T20 World Cup Thursday, notwithstanding another poor fielding effort from her team.India’s abysmal fielding in tournament thus far hit a new low as Bangladesh managed to post 136 for eight at Old Trafford.India, who lost to South Africa largely due to their poor fielding, dropped as many as four catches in the powerplay.The target was very gettable and Shafali provided a flying start to ensure that India got home in 16.5 overs. There was bit of lull in the middle overs before Jemimah Rodrigues (26 off 15 balls) took India close to the finishing line.Having lost to South Africa, India will need to beat Australia June 28 in their bid to make the semifinals.Smriti Mandhana fell cheaply but Shafali single-handedly fired India to 63 for one in the powerplay. She punished the spinners and pacers with equal disdain, unleashing the inside-out shot on multiple occasions.She brought her second World Cup fifty off 29 balls in the eighth over, taking India on the cusp of a big win.The explosive opener was stumped in a rather unusual fashion as she went for a non-existent single after under edging a ball from Nahida Akter in the ninth over, not realising the wicketkeeper had collected the ball and dislodged the stumps.Earlier, all the four dropped catches were rather straightforward but the fielders made a mess of them. Among the guilty were Nandni Sharma, Yastika Bhatia and Radha Yadav, who had grassed two chances in the loss to South Africa in the previous game.The biggest beneficiary of India’s indiscretion was Juairiya Ferdous, who was dropped thrice by the fifth over. Ferdous did hit some fine boundaries but failed to make the most of the luck that came her way.After being warned twice for running on the pitch, Nandni, who had dropped Ferdous and Sobhana Mostary off successive balls, took a sharp return catch to get rid of Ferdous. The opener scored 33 off 31 balls.India have been found wanting in all departments in the tournament thus far. The management has been guilty of making too many changes in the pace department, leaving out the likes of Kranti Gaud.On Thursday, Renuka Thakur got her first game of the competition and she struck in her very first over. Opener Dilara Akter (4) went for the pull but could not clear Shree Charani at deep square leg.Charani bowled a brilliant 20th over, picking up two wickets and giving away only three runs.Unlike her fielding, Radha (3/28) had a better outing with the ball as she removed opposition captain Nigar Sultana (32 off 27 balls) and Mostary (22 off 26 balls) in quick succession.Considering the unusual heat in the UK, spinners have been getting more assistance. India too predominantly stuck to spin in Bangladesh’s innings.Besides the dropped catches, India bowled seven wides and three no-balls.(With agency inputs)

title: Siya's Parents Demand Harshest Punishment If Guilty: 'Should Be Thrown From...'
description: Siya Goyal's parents demanded the harshest punishment for their daughter if found guilty in the alleged murder of her fiancé Ketan Agarwal, saying she should be "thrown from the same place" where he died at Lohagad Fort.
content: Pune: In a startling turn in the Lohagad Fort murder case, the parents of prime accused Siya Goyal have demanded that their own daughter be punished in the exact manner the victim died, if she is found guilty of conspiring to kill her fiancé, Ketan Agarwal.Speaking to reporters, as per ANI, Siya's mother, Pooja Goyal, said: "If anyone is at fault in this, they should be given the harshest punishment. Even if it includes my daughter. If my daughter is found guilty, then she should be thrown from the same place where Ketan was thrown... The family had so much hope for Siya and Ketan's marriage. There were so many expectations, so much affection. Ketan's family also treated Siya with great affection and love. All the functions were going well. They had also organised many programs for her birthday celebration. If we felt that Siya was having some problem or was not able to talk to Ketan, then they would discuss with us... Siya never expressed any displeasure about this marriage... We did not know anything about Chetan. Ever since the engagement, she only spoke to Ketan... I don't believe that she agreed (to commit the crime), but if the investigation reveals she is guilty, then give her the harshest punishment... For the marriage, they booked Ananta Resort in Udaipur. The cost was Rs 3 crores, and we had to spend Rs 5 crores on the wedding..."        Agarwal, a 25-year-old real estate firm director, was initially believed to have died in an accidental fall into a gorge at Pune's Lohagad Fort. However, the investigation took a dramatic turn after police uncovered evidence of an alleged murder conspiracy, leading to the arrest of his fiancée, Siya, and her boyfriend, Chetan Chaudhary.'Would A 19-Year-Old Girl Do Such A Thing?'Siya's father, Pravin Goyal, echoed the same demand, telling reporters: "Whoever did this should receive the harshest punishment. Just like the fort from which our Ketan fell, whoever is found guilty, even if it's my own daughter, should be pushed from there..."He added: "We did not have any prior knowledge about Siya's love affairs. Siya was a simple girl. She is 19 years old. Would a 19-year-old girl do such a thing? I don't know anything about him. Where did Chetan come from? I've never seen his face, nor have I ever spoken to him in my life. He has never been to our house. Ketan's family members are very good, cultured people... We've lost a son and a wonderful relationship... There will be an investigation. Let the investigation take place. I would only want that whatever result comes out, work should be done on it, and the guilty person should be punished..."        Meanwhile, Pune Rural Police investigating the case have alleged that Siya did not want to marry Ketan and conspired with her friend Chetan Chaudhary to eliminate him. Police said the two first met at a Diwali party last year and grew close over the following months, remaining in regular contact while allegedly discussing plans to kill Ketan. Investigators suspect Siya wanted more time for herself and was unwilling to proceed with the marriage despite family pressure, and that while she had grown close to Chetan, she was reportedly not ready to marry him either, allegedly wanting to eliminate Ketan while continuing her relationship with Chetan.According to the probe, Siya allegedly first thought of killing Ketan after seeing him seated near the edge of Lohagad Fort during a visit on 31 May. Police suspect an earlier attempt was made on 14 June, when Siya allegedly tried to push him off the fort; when that attempt failed, she reportedly raised a false alarm about spotting a snake and later claimed the push had been accidental.Ketan's uncle, Vijay Agarwal, demanded justice for his nephew, telling reporters: "We want justice. The search is ongoing, and we have been told it continues, but we have no further information... My son was 26, well-educated. Listening to his parents, he agreed to an arranged marriage, and he was killed. Who said what, I do not know. I only believe in our country's law..."Both Siya Goyal and Chetan Chaudhary remain in police custody till 29 June as the investigation continues.

title: Stock Market Holiday Today: NSE, BSE closed on June 26 for Muharram; equity markets set for 3 day suspension
description: Stock Market Holiday on June 26: Indian stock markets remained closed on June 26 for Muharram, with trading suspended across the NSE and BSE segments. Commodity trading on MCX resumes in the evening, while equity markets reopen on June 29.
content: Stock Market Holiday Today: Indian stock markets will remain closed on Friday on the occasion of Muharram, halting trading across equity, derivatives and currency segments on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) and the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE), according to the exchanges' holiday calendar.The closure gives investors a three-day market break as June 26 falls on a Friday, followed by the regular weekend. Trading will resume on Monday, June 29.There will be no trading in the equity, equity derivatives, currency derivatives, Securities Lending and Borrowing (SLB), Electronic Gold Receipts (EGR), NDS-RST and Tri-Party Repo segments during the holiday.MCX to reopen for evening sessionThe Multi-Commodity Exchange (MCX), however, will observe only a partial trading holiday. Commodity trading will remain suspended during the morning session from 9:00 am to 5:00 pm and resume in the evening session from 5:00 pm until 11:30 pm or 11:55 pm, depending on the commodity contract.Upcoming holidays for BSE, NSEMuharram marks one of the scheduled exchange holidays for 2026. Indian stock exchanges have notified 16 market holidays for the year, with several already observed.The next full market holiday is scheduled for September 14 on account of Ganesh Chaturthi. Trading will also remain suspended later in the year for Gandhi Jayanti on October 2, Dussehra on October 20, Diwali Balipratipada on November 10, Guru Nanak Jayanti on November 24 and Christmas on December 25.NSE, BSE HolidayDateGanesh ChaturthiSeptember 14Gandhi JayantiOctober 2DussehraOctober 20Diwali BalipratipadaNovember 10Guru Nanak JayantiNovember 24ChristmasDecember 25Four other holidays, including Mahashivratri, Eid-Ul-Fitr, Independence Day and Diwali Laxmi Pujan, fall on weekends in 2026 and therefore do not affect trading schedules.Stock Market on June 25Indian equities ended marginally higher on Thursday ahead of the holiday, supported by gains in automobile and banking stocks. The BSE Sensex closed 109 points, or 0.14 per cent, higher at 77,100.47, while the NSE Nifty 50 rose 0.14 per cent to end near 24,056.IndiGo, Mahindra & Mahindra and Maruti Suzuki led the gains among Sensex constituents, while banking stocks, including ICICI Bank and State Bank of India (SBI),  also contributed to the benchmarks' advance.Also Read: Gold Price Today: Precious metal holds above USD 4,000 but faces 7th straight weekly loss - What's driving the downfall?

title: Deal in Danger: Iran Attacks Cargo Ship in Strait of Hormuz Days After Truce
description: This incident raises concerns about Iran's commitment to the agreement, which includes the promise to facilitate commercial vessel passage in exchange for lifting US sanctions.
content: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) attacked a Singapore-flagged cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, according to two senior US officials cited by The Wall Street Journal. The attack comes less than a week after the United States and Iran agreed a deal aimed at ending hostilities and reopening the shipping route. The vessel, Ever Lovely, sustained damage to its bridge but there were no casualties, according to the UK Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO). The incident occurred near the coast of Oman, hours after the IRGC's navy warned ships against using routes through the strait that had not been approved by Iran. The attack is likely to raise questions about the implementation of the 60-day agreement under which Iran committed to making its "best efforts" to ensure the safe passage of commercial vessels through the waterway. In return, the US agreed to lift its blockade of Iranian ports.As part of the deal, Washington also waived sanctions on Iranian oil sales and allowed Tehran to sell crude oil in US dollars for the first time in decades. Shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz had begun to recover this week after months of disruption.      https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vt9uBTtfEEQAccording to ship-tracking firm Kpler, 70 vessels crossed the waterway on Wednesday, more than double the number recorded the previous day. The company said the increase suggested shipping operators were regaining confidence in using the route. The Strait of Hormuz, a critical global energy chokepoint, had seen only limited traffic in recent months because of concerns over Iranian attacks and the US blockade. Over the weekend, Iran declared the strait closed again following fighting between Israel and the Iran-backed Hezbollah group in Lebanon. Ending that conflict is one of the conditions of the broader agreement intended to halt hostilities between the US and Iran. Iran has not officially confirmed that the waterway has reopened. However, it had not attacked commercial vessels transiting the strait since 12 June, when a tanker was struck days before the interim agreement was signed. On Thursday, the Revolutionary Guard said on its official Telegram channel that three tankers using the southern route endorsed by the International Maritime Organization (IMO) had been ordered to turn back. Maritime intelligence firm Windward said five vessels made U-turns. The Revolutionary Guard had earlier warned that any attempt to use a route designated by the IMO would be "unacceptable and completely dangerous" and said all vessels should coordinate with Iranian authorities. According to ship-tracking service Marine Traffic, Ever Lovely had loaded cargo at Umm Qasr in Iraq and was bound for Singapore. The vessel's owner, Evergreen Marine Asia Pte Ltd in Singapore, could not immediately be reached for comment. Financial data provider LSEG said the ship had been stranded in the Gulf for more than 100 days before departing towards the mouth of the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday morning. It was one of four vessels attempting to transit the waterway at around the same time. Ship-tracking data and crew members aboard a nearby vessel indicated that all four ships were following a route identified by the IMO, hugging the Omani coastline. Ever Lovely was travelling fastest and was leading the group. According to seafarers in the flotilla, no warning was issued by the Iranian navy over radio communications and the ships were not instructed to turn back before the attack.

title: Gold Price Today: Precious metal holds above USD 4,000 but faces 7th straight weekly loss - What's driving the downfall?
description: Gold traded near USD 4,023 after recovering above USD 4,000 but remained set for a seventh straight weekly loss amid a stronger dollar and Fed rate hike expectations. Silver hovered near USD 58, down nearly 11% this week.
content: Gold Price Today: Gold prices traded nearly flat on Friday after rebounding above the USD 4,000 per ounce mark in the previous session. However, the precious metal remains on track to post its seventh consecutive weekly decline, weighed down by a stronger US dollar and persistent expectations of a Federal Reserve interest rate hike.Gold Price TodayAs of 5:10 AM, spot gold was trading nearly unchanged at USD 4,023 per ounce. During Thursday's early trading session, bullion slipped below the key USD 4,000 level before recovering after the release of the latest US Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) inflation data, which matched market expectations. Despite the rebound, gold has declined more than 3 per cent this week, marking its longest weekly losing streak in recent months.Silver Price TodaySilver prices also traded in a narrow range, hovering around USD 58 per ounce. The white metal has remained under heavy selling pressure in recent weeks and is on track to record a weekly decline of nearly 11 per cent, significantly underperforming gold.MCX Gold and Silver Trading TodayTrading in precious metals on the Multi-Commodity Exchange (MCX) will remain suspended during the first half of Friday's session due to the Moharram holiday.In the previous trading session:MCX Gold settled at Rs 1,43,200 per 10 grams.MCX Silver ended 0.6 per cent higher at Rs 2,20,940 per kg.Why Are Gold Prices Falling?The ongoing weakness in gold prices is largely driven by the strength of the US Dollar. The US Dollar Index (DXY), which measures the greenback against a basket of six major currencies, has gained nearly 0.7 per cent this week and touched a 52-week high of 101.80.A stronger dollar typically makes gold more expensive for overseas buyers, reducing demand for the precious metal and putting downward pressure on prices.However, the dollar eased slightly after Thursday's PCE inflation report came in line with expectations, reducing immediate concerns over higher inflation.Fed Rate Hike ExpectationsFollowing the inflation data, expectations for a Federal Reserve interest rate hike at the December FOMC meeting eased marginally. According to the CME FedWatch Tool, the probability of a rate hike slipped from 83 per cent to around 81 per cent, offering temporary support to gold prices.Oil Prices Add Pressure to GoldCrude oil prices strengthened on Friday after the United Nations' International Maritime Organisation (IMO) suspended a vessel evacuation plan following an attack on a Singapore-flagged ship in the Strait of Hormuz.As a result:Brent crude futures climbed back above USD 75 per barrel.WTI crude traded above USD 71 per barrel.Higher oil prices can fuel inflation, reinforcing expectations of tighter monetary policy by the Federal Reserve. Elevated interest rates generally reduce the appeal of non-yielding assets like gold, adding further pressure on bullion prices.Gold Price OutlookGold continues to face headwinds from a resilient US dollar, elevated Treasury yields, and expectations of tighter monetary policy. Investors will closely monitor upcoming US economic data and comments from Federal Reserve officials for further direction. Meanwhile, movements in the dollar and crude oil prices are likely to remain key drivers for gold and silver in the near term.(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money-related decisions.)

title: NASA, US Small Business Administration to Announce Partnership
description: NASA and the U.S. Small Business Administration will sign a memorandum of agreement during a ceremony at 1 p.m. EDT, Monday, June 29, at NASA Headquarters in Washington. The agreement will create a new interagency initiative that directly responds to President Donald J. Trump’s National Space Policy and supports the growth of the American space […]
content:
Credit: NASA


NASA and the U.S. Small Business Administration will sign a memorandum of agreement during a ceremony at 1 p.m. EDT, Monday, June 29, at NASA Headquarters in Washington.



The agreement will create a new interagency initiative that directly responds to President Donald J. Trump’s National Space Policy and supports the growth of the American space economy.



Participants include:




NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman



SBA Administrator Kelly Loeffler




This event is in person only. Media interested in attending must RSVP no later than 10 a.m. on June 29 to: hq-media@mail.nasa.gov. NASA’s media accreditation policy is available online. 



For more information about NASA’s missions, visit:



https://www.nasa.gov



-end-



Camille Gallo / Cheryl WarnerHeadquarters, Washington202-358-1600camille.m.gallo@nasa.gov / cheryl.m.warner@nasa.gov

title: Ahilyanagar : नगरमध्ये आणखी चार दिवस येलो अलर्ट
description: अहिल्यानगर |प्रतिनिधी| Ahilyanagar अहिल्यानगर जिल्ह्यासाठी पुढील चार दिवस भारतीय हवामान विभागाने मुसळधार पावसाचा अंदाज वर्तवत मयेलो अलर्ट जारी केला आहे. दरम्यान, गुरुवारी दिवसभर पावसाने प्रामुख्याने उघडीप दिली असून काही ठिकाणी हलक्या स्वरूपाच्या सरी (शावर पाऊस) कोसळल्या. सद्यस्थितीत जिल्ह्यातील अनेक भागांत अद्याप पेरणीयोग्य पाऊस झालेला नाही. त्यामुळे शेतकर्‍यांनी पेरणीची घाई करू नये, असे आवाहन कृषी विभागाच्या […]
content:
अहिल्यानगर |प्रतिनिधी| Ahilyanagar



अहिल्यानगर जिल्ह्यासाठी पुढील चार दिवस भारतीय हवामान विभागाने मुसळधार पावसाचा अंदाज वर्तवत मयेलो अलर्ट जारी केला आहे. दरम्यान, गुरुवारी दिवसभर पावसाने प्रामुख्याने उघडीप दिली असून काही ठिकाणी हलक्या स्वरूपाच्या सरी (शावर पाऊस) कोसळल्या. सद्यस्थितीत जिल्ह्यातील अनेक भागांत अद्याप पेरणीयोग्य पाऊस झालेला नाही. त्यामुळे शेतकर्‍यांनी पेरणीची घाई करू नये, असे आवाहन कृषी विभागाच्या वतीने करण्यात आले आहे.हवामान विभागाने दिलेल्या माहितीनुसार, गुरुवारी (25 जून) ते 29 जून या कालावधीत जिल्ह्यासाठी मयेलो अलर्ट जाहीर करण्यात आला आहे.



यादरम्यान अहिल्यानगरसह ठाणे, मुंबई, रायगड, रत्नागिरी, सिंधुदुर्ग, सांगली, कोल्हापूर, सोलापूर, नाशिक, छत्रपती संभाजीनगर, जालना, बीड, परभणी, हिंगोली, नांदेड, बुलढाणा, अकोला, वाशीम, अमरावती, वर्धा, नागपूर, भंडारा, गोंदिया आणि गडचिरोली या जिल्ह्यांमध्ये येलो अलर्ट असेल; तर पुणे, सातारा, धाराशिव, लातूर, यवतमाळ आणि चंद्रपूर या जिल्ह्यांसाठी मऑरेंज अलर्टफ देण्यात आला आहे. उर्वरित राज्यांत मग्रीन अलर्टफ असेल.जिल्ह्यात बुधवारी दिवसभर पावसाची रिमझिम सुरू होती, मात्र गुरुवारी बहुतांश ठिकाणी पावसाने विश्रांती घेतली. दिवसभरात केवळ अधूनमधून पावसाच्या हलक्या सरी येत होत्या. अनेक मंडळांमध्ये अद्याप समाधानकारक व पेरणीयोग्य पाऊस न झाल्याने, पुरेशी ओल आल्याशिवाय शेतकर्‍यांनी बियाणे वाया घालवू नयेत असे कृषी तज्ज्ञांचे म्हणणे आहे. जिल्ह्यात सध्या दमदार पावसाची प्रतीक्षा असून, मान्सून लांबल्यास त्याचा थेट परिणाम खरीप हंगामाच्या पेरण्यांवर होण्याची शक्यता वर्तवली जात आहे.

title: Shivacharya Abhinavgupta's vision remains timeless beacon: LG Sinha
description:
Srinagar, Jun 25: Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha on Thursday attended the Rudra Abhishek ceremony on the auspicious occasion of Shivacharya Abhinavgupta Jayanti and Nirjala Ekadashi at Shri Anandishwar Bhairav Nath Ji Maharaj Asthapan, Maisuma, Srinagar, and extended his heartiest greetings to the devotees while offering his deepest prayers for the peace, well-being, and prosperity of all.
"The life and teachings of Shivacharya Abhinavgupta, foremost exponent of Kashmir Shaivism, continue to illuminate India's spiritual heritage. From aesthetics to profound philosophy of Self-recognition, his vision remains a timeless beacon of non-dual consciousness," he said.
The Lieutenant Governor observed that Shri Anandishwar Bhairav Nath Ji Maharaj Asthapan continues to occupy a cherished place in the collective consciousness of Jammu and Kashmir, and said the vision of great sages reminds us that our collective growth and harmony are beautifully interconnected.
The members of Shri Anandishwar Bhairav Nath Asthapan Trust's Organizing and Management Committees, including President Shri Omkar Nath Bhat, Vice President Shri Hari Krishan Koul, Executive Member Shri Hira Lal Koul, Joint Secretary Shri Pushpati Nath Koul, and Secretary Shri Vijay Sas, were present.
The Lieutenant Governor was accompanied by IGP Kashmir V.K. Birdi, IGP CID Tejinder Singh, SSP Srinagar Dr. G.V. Sundeep Chakravarthy, Deputy Commissioner Srinagar Akshay Labroo, and other senior officers.

title: पंढरपूरला जाणार्‍या वारकर्‍यांसाठी रेल्वेची खास घोषणा

content:
सोलापूर | Solapur



आषाढी एकादशीनिमित्त पंढरपूच्या विठुरायाचे दर्शन घेण्यासाठी लाखो वारकर्‍यांसाठी मध्य रेल्वेच्या सोलापूर विभागाने मोठा दिलासा दिला आहे. यंदा आषाढी वारीसाठी 54 विशेष रेल्वे फेर्‍या चालवण्याचा निर्णय रेल्वे प्रशासनाने घेतला आहे. यामध्ये विदर्भ, खान्देश, पश्चिम महाराष्ट्र आणि मराठवाड्याला जोडणार्‍या विशेष गाड्यांचा समावेश असून, बहुतांश गाड्या अनारक्षित असणार आहेत.

पंढरपूर आगमन/प्रस्थान: सकाळी 08.00 / 08.25 – गाडी क्र. 01206 विशेष मिरजहून दि. 24 व 25 जुलै 2026 रोजी दुपारी 12.55 वाजता सुटेल व दुसर्‍या दिवशी दुपारी 12.25 वाजता नागपूर येथे पोहोचेल. (2 फेर्‍या)

रचना: 2 वातानुकूलित तृतीय श्रेणी, 10 शयनयान, 6 सामान्य द्वितीय श्रेणी (2 लगेज-कम-गार्ड ब्रेक व्हॅनसह) – एकूण 18 डबे.



नवीन अमरावती – पंढरपूर आषाढी विशेष (4 फेर्‍या) – 



गाडी क्र. 01119 विशेष नवीन अमरावतीहून दि. 21 व 24 जुलै 2026 रोजी दुपारी 2.40 वाजता सुटेल व दुसर्‍या दिवशी सकाळी 9.10 वाजता पंढरपूर येथे पोहोचेल. (2 फेर्‍या)



गाडी क्र. 01120 विशेष पंढरपूरहून दि. 22 व 25 जुलै 2026 रोजी सायंकाळी 7.30 वाजता सुटेल व दुसर्‍या दिवशी दुपारी 12.50 वाजता नवीन अमरावती येथे पोहोचेल. (2 फेर्‍या)



थांबे: बडनेरा, मूर्तिजापूर, अकोला, शेगाव, जळंब, नांदुरा, मलकापूर, बोदवड, भुसावळ, जळगाव, पाचोरा, चाळीसगाव, नांदगाव, मनमाड, कोपरगाव, बेलापूर, अहिल्यानगर, दौंड आणि कुर्डुवाडी.



रचना: 2 वातानुकूलित तृतीय श्रेणी, 10 शयनयान, 6 सामान्य द्वितीय श्रेणी (2 लगेज-कम-गार्ड ब्रेक व्हॅनसह) – एकूण 18 डबे.



खामगाव – पंढरपूर आषाढी विशेष (4 फेर्‍या)गाडी क्र. 01121 विशेष खामगावहून दि. 22 व 25 जुलै 2026 रोजी सकाळी 11.30 वाजता सुटेल व दुसर्‍या दिवशी पहाटे 3.30 वाजता पंढरपूर येथे पोहोचेल. (2 फेर्‍या)गाडी क्र. 01122 विशेष पंढरपूरहून दि. 23 व 26 जुलै 2026 रोजी पहाटे 5.00 वाजता सुटेल व त्याच दिवशी सायंकाळी 7.30 वाजता खामगाव येथे पोहोचेल. (2 फेर्‍या)



थांबे: जळंब, नंदुरा, मलकापूर, बोदवड, भुसावळ, जळगाव, पाचोरा, चाळीसगाव, नांदगाव, मनमाड, कोपरगाव, बेलापूर, अहिल्यानगर, दौंड आणि कुर्डुवाडी.



रचना: 2 वातानुकूलित तृतीय श्रेणी, 10 शयनयान, 6 सामान्य द्वितीय श्रेणी (2 लगेज-कम-गार्ड ब्रेक व्हॅनसह) – एकूण 18 डबे.



भुसावळ – पंढरपूर अनारक्षित आषाढी विशेष (4 फेर्‍या)गाडी क्र. 01159 विशेष भुसावळहून दि. 24 व 25 जुलै 2026 रोजी दुपारी 1.30 वाजता सुटेल व दुसर्‍या दिवशी पहाटे 3.30 वाजता पंढरपूर येथे पोहोचेल.गाडी क्र. 01160 विशेष पंढरपूरहून दि. 25 व 26 जुलै 2026 रोजी रात्री 10.30 वाजता सुटेल व दुसर्‍या दिवशी दुपारी 1.00 वाजता भुसावळ येथे पोहोचेल.थांबे: जळगाव, पाचोरा, चाळीसगाव, नांदगाव, मनमाड, कोपरगाव, बेलापूर, अहिल्यानगर, दौंड आणि कुर्डुवाडी.रचना: 18 सामान्य द्वितीय श्रेणी डबे (2 लगेज-कम-गार्ड ब्रेक व्हॅनसह).



आरक्षण व तिकीट बुकिंगविशेष शुल्कासह चालविण्यात येणार्‍या आषाढी विशेष गाड्यांचे आरक्षण सर्व संगणकीकृत आरक्षण केंद्रांवर तसेच संकेतस्थळावर उपलब्ध राहील. अनारक्षित डब्यांसाठी तिकिटे रेल्वे स्थानकांवरील बुकिंग काउंटर तसेच अ‍ॅपद्वारे उपलब्ध असतील. प्रवाशांनी वैध तिकिटासह प्रवास करून गैरसोय टाळावी, असे आवाहन करण्यात येत आहे.

title: Scientific planning key to lake conservation: CM

Ashura: LG, CM pay tribute to Imam Hussain (AS)
description:
Srinagar, Jun 25: Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha and Chief Minister Omar Abdullah on Thursday paid rich tributes to Hazrat Imam Hussain (AS) and the martyrs of Karbala, recalling their unparalleled sacrifice for truth, justice, and righteousness on the solemn occasion of Ashura, the 10th day of Muharram.
In his message, the Lieutenant Governor said: "The supreme sacrifices of Hazrat Imam Hussain (AS) and his companions at Karbala remain a timeless beacon for humanity, upholding truth, justice, and human dignity. Let us resolve to imbibe these universal ideals and work together to build a peaceful, progressive, and equitable society."
Chief Minister Omar Abdullah observed that the tragedy of Karbala remains an eternal symbol of courage, steadfastness, and resistance against tyranny, noting that Imam Hussain (AS), along with his devoted family members and companions, upheld the highest ideals of faith, justice, compassion, and human dignity through their supreme sacrifice.
"The message of Karbala transcends time and geography. It inspires humanity to stand firm in the face of injustice, uphold moral values, and safeguard the principles of truth and righteousness, irrespective of the challenges," the Chief Minister said.
CM Omar Abdullah emphasised that the teachings and sacrifice of Imam Hussain (AS) continue to serve as a beacon of hope and guidance for people across the world, reminding society of the importance of selflessness, integrity, and unwavering commitment to justice. He urged people to imbibe the timeless values exemplified by the martyrs of Karbala and work collectively towards fostering peace, harmony, mutual respect, and brotherhood in society.
On the occasion, Omar Abdullah joined the people in solemn observance of Ashura and prayed for lasting peace, communal harmony, and prosperity in Jammu and Kashmir, and for eternal peace to the revered martyrs of Karbala.

title: Ahilyanagar : मागणी नसतानाही 24 हजार लिटर रॉकेलचा पुरवठा
description: अहिल्यानगर |प्रतिनिधी| Ahilyanagar मध्य पूर्वेतील युद्धजन्य परिस्थितीमुळे घरगुती एलपीजी गॅसच्या पुरवठ्यावर परिणाम होण्याची शक्यता निर्माण झाली आहे. या संभाव्य इंधन टंचाईचा सामना करण्यासाठी सरकारने दोन महिन्यांपूर्वी रेशनवर पुन्हा रॉकेल (घासलेट) उपलब्ध करून देण्याचा निर्णय घेतला होता. त्यानुसार अहिल्यानगर जिल्ह्यासाठी 2 लाख 16 हजार लीटर रॉकेलचा कोटा मंजूर करण्यात आला आहे. दोन महिन्यांच्या प्रतीक्षेनंतर आता श्रीरामपूर […]
content:
अहिल्यानगर |प्रतिनिधी| Ahilyanagar



मध्य पूर्वेतील युद्धजन्य परिस्थितीमुळे घरगुती एलपीजी गॅसच्या पुरवठ्यावर परिणाम होण्याची शक्यता निर्माण झाली आहे. या संभाव्य इंधन टंचाईचा सामना करण्यासाठी सरकारने दोन महिन्यांपूर्वी रेशनवर पुन्हा रॉकेल (घासलेट) उपलब्ध करून देण्याचा निर्णय घेतला होता. त्यानुसार अहिल्यानगर जिल्ह्यासाठी 2 लाख 16 हजार लीटर रॉकेलचा कोटा मंजूर करण्यात आला आहे. दोन महिन्यांच्या प्रतीक्षेनंतर आता श्रीरामपूर आणि जामखेड तालुक्यासाठी प्रत्येकी 12 हजार लीटर याप्रमाणे 24 हजार लीटर रॉकेलचा पुरवठा झाला आहे. मात्र, सध्या कोणाकडेही मागणी नसताना सरकारने पाठवलेले हे रॉकेल विकत कोण घेणार? असा मोठा प्रश्न निर्माण झाला आहे.



देशात एलपीजी गॅसचा वापर वाढल्यानंतर महाराष्ट्रात रेशनवरील रॉकेलचे वितरण टप्प्याटप्प्याने पूर्णपणे बंद करण्यात आले होते. त्यामुळे गेल्या अनेक वर्षांपासून जिल्ह्यातील नागरिकांना रेशनवर रॉकेल मिळत नव्हते. मात्र, आंतरराष्ट्रीय घडामोडी आणि इंधन पुरवठ्यावरील संभाव्य ताण लक्षात घेऊन सरकारने एप्रिल महिन्यात पुन्हा रॉकेल पुरवठा सुरू करण्याचा निर्णय घेतला. या निर्णयापूर्वी, जिल्ह्यात रॉकेलवर चालणारे स्टोव्ह उपलब्ध आहेत का, तसेच नागरिकांकडे स्टोव्ह नसल्यास तालुकानिहाय बाजारपेठेत स्टोव्ह विक्रीसाठी उपलब्ध आहेत का, याची माहिती प्रशासनाकडून घेण्यात आली होती. 



प्रत्यक्षात बाजारात अथवा नागरिकांकडे स्टोव्ह उपलब्ध नसतानाही सरकारने जिल्ह्यासाठी हा रॉकेलचा कोटा रवाना केला आहे. जिल्ह्यासाठी एकूण 2 लाख 16 हजार लीटर रॉकेलचा कोटा मंजूर झाला आहे. 62 रुपये 75 पैसे प्रतिलीटर या दराने प्रत्येक रेशनधारक कुटुंबाला 3 लीटर रॉकेल वितरीत करण्यात येणार आहे. सध्या श्रीरामपूर आणि जामखेड तालुक्याला मिळालेले 24 हजार लीटर रॉकेल प्रायोगिक तत्त्वावर दिले जाईल.



तालुकानिहाय मंजूर रॉकेल (लिटरमध्ये)अकोले 24 हजार, जामखेड 12 हजार, कर्जत 12 हजार कोपरगाव 12 हजार, नगर 24 हजार, नेवासा 12 हजार, पारनेर 12 हजार, पाथर्डी 12 हजार, राहाता 12 हजार, राहुरी 24 हजार संगमनेर 24 हजार, शेवगाव 12 हजार, श्रीगोंदा 12 हजार आणि श्रीरामपूर 12 हजार असा आहे.



श्रीरामपूर आणि जामखेड तालुक्यासाठी आलेले रॉकेल प्रथम येणार्‍यास प्राधान्य या तत्त्वावर रेशन दुकानातून वितरित केले जाईल. या वितरणादरम्यान नागरिकांकडून मिळणारा प्रतिसाद, रॉकेलची प्रत्यक्ष मागणी आणि त्याची उपलब्धता याचा सविस्तर आढावा घेतला जाईल.– हेमा बडे (जिल्हा पुरवठा अधिकारी, अहिल्यानगर)

title: ‘Major boost for Kashmir tourism’
description:
Srinagar, Jun 25: The Gulmarg Gondola will resume commercial operations from Friday after remaining closed for nearly a month for extensive mechanical inspection, testing and maintenance, Director Tourism Qamar Sajad announced on Thursday.
Speaking after the reopening ceremony, Sajad said all mandatory technical inspections had been successfully completed before the decision to restart the service.
"The Gondola has undergone all the mechanical tests required at our level. Every technical aspect was examined in detail, the snags were rectified, and the load-bearing, cabin and cable-related tests were successfully completed," he said.
He said Chief Minister Omar Abdullah visited Gulmarg on Thursday, took a ride on the Gondola and formally inaugurated the service, following which tourists were allowed to use the facility. Commercial operations will begin on Friday.
Calling the reopening a significant boost for the tourism sector, Sajad praised the Jammu and Kashmir Cable Car Corporation for ensuring the highest standards of maintenance.
"It is a proud moment for the Cable Car Corporation. Once again, it has proved its capability in mechanical maintenance and ensuring the safe restoration of services," he said.
The Director Tourism also lauded the dedication of the corporation's employees, including regular, contractual and casual workers, for their commitment during the maintenance period and the recent rescue operation carried out on the Gondola.
"Our employees worked tirelessly. During the recent rescue operation, they played a crucial role in safely bringing stranded passengers down from the upper terminal. Their efforts deserve appreciation," he said.
Recognising their contribution, Sajad said the Chief Minister announced a reward of Rs 50,000 each for members of the rescue team.
He also said six contractual employees of the Cable Car Corporation were handed regularisation orders during the function, while arrears amounting to nearly Rs 28 lakh were released in their favour.
Sajad said motivating employees strengthens the entire organisation, adding that the corporation's achievements are the result of the hard work and commitment of its workforce.
On the issue of casual workers, he said the corporation's Board had already resolved that their regularisation would be considered in accordance with any policy adopted by the government for casual labourers in other departments.
He added that the Cable Car Corporation provides better facilities to its casual staff than many other organisations and reaffirmed the management's commitment to supporting employees on matters related to welfare, regularisation and working conditions.
"We consider it our responsibility to encourage and support our workforce. Their welfare remains our priority," Sajad said.

title: Gulmarg Gondola reopens after safety clearance
description:
CM says no compromise on passenger safety
Rs 50,000, regularisation for rescuers
Srinagar, Jun 25: The Gulmarg Gondola has resumed operations after remaining shut for nearly two weeks following a major technical fault, with Chief Minister Omar Abdullah saying the service was restarted only after receiving the required safety certification from the Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM).
The Gondola was suspended earlier this month after a gearbox malfunction brought the ropeway to a halt, leaving dozens of cabins stranded mid-air. Around 1,000 tourists were safely evacuated in a large-scale rescue operation involving the Gulmarg Cable Car Corporation's rescue teams, volunteers, the Army and Police. No injuries were reported.
Speaking after the restoration of services, Omar said the government did not rush the reopening despite the faulty gearbox having been replaced within four to five days of the incident.
"We first received an interim report, after which the OEM inspected the repair work on site. The company thoroughly examined the service and maintenance procedures and certified the system before we allowed the Gondola to resume operations," he said.
The CM stressed that passenger safety remained the government's highest priority and that operations were restored only after every required safety protocol had been completed.
He said tourist arrivals in Gulmarg remained largely unaffected during the shutdown, adding that the reopening of the Gondola is expected to further boost visitor numbers in the coming days.
Omar also acknowledged the efforts of the rescue teams that carried out the evacuation during the breakdown. He said that of the nearly 52 cabins stranded on the ropeway, more than 40 were evacuated by the Cable Car Corporation's own volunteers and rescue personnel, while the Army and Police assisted in evacuating the remaining cabins.
Noting that the contribution of the corporation's rescue workers often went unnoticed, the Chief Minister announced a reward of Rs 50, 000 for each volunteer in recognition of their efforts during the operation.
He also said several rescue team members have already been regularised and expressed hope that the remaining volunteers would also be considered in due course.
The Gulmarg Gondola, one of Asia's highest cable car projects and a major attraction for tourists visiting Kashmir, resumed services after the completion of all technical inspections and safety clearances.

title: NASA Selects Rocket Lab to Launch Sun, Earth Science Missions
description: NASA has selected Rocket Lab to provide the launch service for both the agency’s PolSIR (Polarized Submillimeter Ice-cloud Radiometer) and Total and Spectral Solar Irradiance Sensor-2 (TSIS-2) missions. The two selections are part of NASA’s Venture-Class Acquisition of Dedicated and Rideshare (VADR) launch services contract. This contract allows the agency to award fixed-price indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity launch […]
content:
NASA has selected Rocket Lab to provide the launch service for both the agency’s PolSIR (Polarized Submillimeter Ice-cloud Radiometer) and Total and Spectral Solar Irradiance Sensor-2 (TSIS-2) missions.



The two selections are part of NASA’s Venture-Class Acquisition of Dedicated and Rideshare (VADR) launch services contract. This contract allows the agency to award fixed-price indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity launch service task orders during VADR’s 10-year ordering period, with a maximum total contract value of $300 million.



The PoISIR mission will help provide a better understanding of ice clouds that form at high altitudes throughout tropical and subtropical regions. Rocket Lab will launch PolSIR aboard two of its dedicated Electron rockets no earlier than June 2027 from Launch Complex 1 in Mahia, New Zealand.



Consisting of two small satellites, both of PoISIR’s 16U CubeSats have a scientific instrument designed to measure a specific spectrum of electromagnetic radiation, which will determine how the amount of ice in tropical clouds rises and falls during the day, as well as how the ice changes connect to larger storms. The instruments also will help determine how ice clouds affect sunlight and heat radiation throughout the day. The pair of CubeSats will fly in orbits separated by several hours to observe the pattern of cloud ice content changes over a day. This information will help researchers make more accurate weather predictions.



The PolSIR mission’s principal investigator is Vanderbilt University in Nashville. Science operations will be conducted by the Space Science and Engineering Center at the University of Wisconsin in Madison. The two spacecraft are being built by Blue Canyon Technologies.



The TSIS-2 mission will measure the Sun’s energy input to Earth. The spacecraft will provide critical data for understanding our planet’s ocean currents, seasons, and weather. The mission will continue NASA’s work to study and protect our home planet by providing insights that can only be gathered from space. Rocket Lab will launch TSIS-2 aboard an Electron rocket in early 2027 from Launch Complex 1 in Mahia.



The satellite measures Earth’s solar energy input, both the total irradiance, which is the Sun’s overall brightness at the top of Earth’s atmosphere, and the spectral irradiance, or how that energy is distributed across ultraviolet, visible, and infrared wavelengths. The satellite’s two instruments, the Total Irradiance Monitor and the Spectral Irradiance Monitor, are similar to those used for TSIS-1. Together, they cover a wavelength range that includes 96% of the energy in the solar spectrum. While TSIS‑1 works from the International Space Station, TSIS‑2 will operate from a free‑flying spacecraft.



Managed by NASA’s Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, TSIS-2 includes instruments provided by the Laboratory for Atmospheric and Space Physics at the University of Colorado, Boulder, and the spacecraft is provided by General Atomics – Electromagnetic Systems.



NASA’s Launch Services Program, based at the agency’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida, manages the VADR contract.



Learn more about VADR online:



https://www.nasa.gov/vadr-venture-class-acquisition-of-dedicated-and-rideshare-launch-services

title: Shrirampur : टाकळीभानमध्ये कट्टा दाखवून मॅनेजरला कोंडले
description: श्रीरामपूर |प्रतिनिधी| Shrirampur तालुक्यातील टाकळीभान येथील देशी दारू दुकानात मॅनेजरला गावठी कट्ट्याचा धाक दाखवून खोलीत कोंडत रोख रक्कम व सोन्याची चैन असा एकूण 1 लाख 88 हजार रुपयांचा मुद्देमाल लुटून नेल्याची घटना घडली. पोलिसांनी दिलेल्या माहितीनुसार, नरेश रामास्वामी दुलम (वय 44) हे टाकळीभान येथील आर. एन. कापसे यांच्या मालकीच्या देशी दारू दुकानात गेल्या 20 वर्षांपासून […]
content:
श्रीरामपूर |प्रतिनिधी| Shrirampur



तालुक्यातील टाकळीभान येथील देशी दारू दुकानात मॅनेजरला गावठी कट्ट्याचा धाक दाखवून खोलीत कोंडत रोख रक्कम व सोन्याची चैन असा एकूण 1 लाख 88 हजार रुपयांचा मुद्देमाल लुटून नेल्याची घटना घडली. पोलिसांनी दिलेल्या माहितीनुसार, नरेश रामास्वामी दुलम (वय 44) हे टाकळीभान येथील आर. एन. कापसे यांच्या मालकीच्या देशी दारू दुकानात गेल्या 20 वर्षांपासून मॅनेजर म्हणून कार्यरत आहेत. घटनेच्या दिवशी त्यांनी आपल्या गळ्यातील सुमारे 10 ग्रॅम वजनाची सोन्याची चैन दुकानातील ड्रॉवरमध्ये ठेवली होती. त्याच ड्रॉवरमध्ये दुकानातील 48 हजार रुपयांची रोख रक्कमही ठेवलेली होती.



दुपारी साडेचारच्या सुमारास आराम करत असताना इकबाल उर्फ सोन्या शेख हा त्यांच्या खोलीत आला. त्याने एक लाख रुपयांची खंडणी मागितली. दुलम यांनी पैसे देण्यास नकार दिल्यानंतर आरोपीने कंबरेला लावलेला गावठी कट्टा दाखवत जीवे मारण्याची धमकी दिली. तसेच स्वतःवर अनेक गुन्हे असल्याचे सांगून दहशत निर्माण केली.



यानंतर आरोपीने दुलम यांना गोदामाच्या खोलीत कोंडून ठेवले. त्यानंतर दुकानातील काउंटरवर जाऊन तेथे बसलेल्या दिलीप येवले यांनाही धाक दाखवत गल्ल्यातील 48 हजार रुपयांची रोकड आणि ड्रॉवरमधील सोन्याची चैन बळजबरीने घेऊन तो पळून गेला. घटनेनंतर दुलम यांनी आरडाओरडा केल्यावर एका ग्राहकाने त्यांची सुटका केली. याप्रकरणी नरेश दुलम यांच्या फिर्यादीवरून इकबाल शेख उर्फ सोन्या (रा. टाकळीभान) याच्याविरुद्ध भारतीय न्याय संहिता कलम 2023 प्रमाणे 309 (1),308,327, 351 (2), 351 (3),3,25 प्रमाणे गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे. या धाडसी लुटीमुळे टाकळीभान परिसरात भीतीचे वातावरण निर्माण झाले असून आरोपीचा शोध घेण्यासाठी पोलिसांनी तपासाची चक्रे वेगाने फिरविली आहेत.

title: Ahilyanagar : आधार प्रमाणीकरण, एग्रीस्टॅक नोंदणी अनिवार्य
description: अहिल्यानगर |प्रतिनिधी| Ahilyanagar राज्य शासनाने थकीत पीक कर्जाच्या ओझ्यातून शेतकर्‍यांना दिलासा देण्यासाठी तसेच नियमित कर्जफेड करणार्‍या शेतकर्‍यांना प्रोत्साहन देण्यासाठी पुण्यश्लोक अहिल्यादेवी होळकर शेतकरी कर्जमुक्ती योजना जाहीर केली असून, या योजनेअंतर्गत पात्र शेतकर्‍यांना कमाल दोन लाख रूपयांपर्यंत कर्जमुक्तीचा लाभ दिला जाणार आहे. या योजनेचा लाभ घेण्यासाठी शेतकर्‍यांनी आधार प्रमाणीकरण तसेच एग्रीस्टॅक पोर्टलवरील नोंदणीची प्रक्रिया तत्काळ पूर्ण […]
content:
अहिल्यानगर |प्रतिनिधी| Ahilyanagar



राज्य शासनाने थकीत पीक कर्जाच्या ओझ्यातून शेतकर्‍यांना दिलासा देण्यासाठी तसेच नियमित कर्जफेड करणार्‍या शेतकर्‍यांना प्रोत्साहन देण्यासाठी पुण्यश्लोक अहिल्यादेवी होळकर शेतकरी कर्जमुक्ती योजना जाहीर केली असून, या योजनेअंतर्गत पात्र शेतकर्‍यांना कमाल दोन लाख रूपयांपर्यंत कर्जमुक्तीचा लाभ दिला जाणार आहे. या योजनेचा लाभ घेण्यासाठी शेतकर्‍यांनी आधार प्रमाणीकरण तसेच एग्रीस्टॅक पोर्टलवरील नोंदणीची प्रक्रिया तत्काळ पूर्ण करावी, असे आवाहन जिल्हाधिकारी डॉ. पंकज आशिया व जिल्हा उपनिबंधक, सहकारी संस्था मंगेश सुरवसे यांनी केले आहे.



नैसर्गिक आपत्ती, अनियमित पाऊस, अतिवृष्टी, दुष्काळ व गारपीट यांमुळे पीक कर्जाची परतफेड करू न शकलेल्या थकबाकीदार शेतकर्‍यांना नव्याने कर्ज उपलब्ध व्हावे, यासाठी 2 जून 2026 रोजी झालेल्या मंत्रिमंडळ बैठकीत या योजनेस मान्यता देण्यात आली. यानुसार 1 एप्रिल 2019 ते 31 मार्च 2025 या कालावधीत घेतलेल्या अल्पमुदतीच्या पीक कर्जांपैकी 30 सप्टेंबर 2025 रोजी थकीत असलेली आणि 31 मार्च 2026 पर्यंत परतफेड न झालेली कर्जे विचारात घेतली जाणार आहेत. पात्र शेतकर्‍यांना कमाल दोन लाख रूपयांपर्यंत कर्जमुक्तीचा लाभ दिला जाईल. यापूर्वी महात्मा ज्योतीराव फुले शेतकरी कर्जमुक्ती योजना-2019 चा लाभ घेतलेल्या पात्र शेतकर्‍यांना कमाल 50 हजार रूपयांपर्यंत कर्जमुक्ती देण्यात येईल.



ज्या शेतकर्‍यांची थकबाकी निर्धारित मर्यादेपेक्षा अधिक आहे, त्यांना एकवेळ तडजोड योजनेअंतर्गत अतिरिक्त रक्कम स्वतः भरल्यानंतर शासनाच्या योजनेचा लाभ घेता येणार असून, यासाठी 31 मार्च 2027 पर्यंत मुदत देण्यात आली आहे. या योजनेची संपूर्ण प्रक्रिया ऑनलाइन पध्दतीने राबविण्यात येणार असून, शासनामार्फत याबाबत स्वतंत्र मार्गदर्शक सूचना लवकरच प्रसिध्द करण्यात येतील. या योजनेचा लाभ घेण्यासाठी आधार प्रमाणीकरण व एग्रीस्टॅक पोर्टलवर नोंदणी करणे अनिवार्य राहील.



वारसांची नोंद आवश्यकअनेक पात्र शेतकरी आधार क्रमांक, बँक खात्याची अपूर्ण माहिती किंवा डिजिटल नोंदणीच्या अभावामुळे योजनेच्या लाभापासून वंचित राहतात. त्यामुळे सर्व पात्र शेतकरी बांधवांनी आपले आधार क्रमांक, बँक खाते, मोबाईल क्रमांक व जमिनीच्या नोंदी अद्ययावत करून मृत कर्जदार खातेदारांच्या वारसांची नोंद करून घेणे आवश्यक आहे. तसेच, आधार नसल्यास तात्काळ नवीन आधार कार्ड काढून घ्यावे आणि आधार क्रमांकाशी चालू मोबाईल क्रमांक संलग्न (लिंक) करून घ्यावा, जेणेकरून आधार प्रमाणीकरणाची प्रक्रिया सुलभपणे पूर्ण करता येईल.

title: Crime News : घरफोडी करून तीन तोळ्याचे दागिने लंपास
description: अहिल्यानगर |प्रतिनिधी| Ahilyanagar तपोवन रस्ता परिसरातील शिवाजीनगर येथे राहत्या घरात प्रवेश करून सुमारे तीन तोळ्याचे सोन्याचे दागिने व 9 हजार 500 रूपयांची रोख रक्कम चोरून नेल्याप्रकरणी एका महिलेसह अन्य चार अनोळखी व्यक्तींविरूध्द न्यायालयाच्या आदेशाने मंगळवारी (23 जून) गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे. याबाबत सचिन बाबासाहेब दहिफळे (वय 40, रा. थ्री डी कॉर्नर, शिवाजीनगर, तपोवन रस्ता) […]
content:
अहिल्यानगर |प्रतिनिधी| Ahilyanagar



तपोवन रस्ता परिसरातील शिवाजीनगर येथे राहत्या घरात प्रवेश करून सुमारे तीन तोळ्याचे सोन्याचे दागिने व 9 हजार 500 रूपयांची रोख रक्कम चोरून नेल्याप्रकरणी एका महिलेसह अन्य चार अनोळखी व्यक्तींविरूध्द न्यायालयाच्या आदेशाने मंगळवारी (23 जून) गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे. याबाबत सचिन बाबासाहेब दहिफळे (वय 40, रा. थ्री डी कॉर्नर, शिवाजीनगर, तपोवन रस्ता) यांनी फिर्याद दिली आहे. स्वाती बाबासाहेब सोनवणे (रा. लेखानगर, पाईपलाईन रस्ता, सावेडी) या महिलेसह चार अनोळखीविरूध्द गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे. 



पोलिसांनी दिलेल्या माहितीनुसार, 20 मार्च 2024 रोजी सायंकाळी साडेसहा ते साडेसात वाजण्याच्या दरम्यान फिर्यादी सचिन दहिफळे व त्यांची आई भाजी खरेदीसाठी तपोवन रस्त्यावरील भाजी मार्केटमध्ये गेले होते. त्यावेळी स्वाती सोनवणे हिने अन्य चार अनोळखी व्यक्तींसोबत संगनमत करून दहिफळे यांच्या घरासमोरील कुंडीत ठेवलेली चावी घेत घरात प्रवेश केल्याचा आरोप आहे. घरात प्रवेश केल्यानंतर संशयित आरोपींनी बेडरूममधील कपाट उघडून त्यातील सामानाची उचकापाचक केली. कपाटात ठेवलेले 30 ग्रॅम वजनाचे सोन्याचे दागिने, ज्यामध्ये बोरमाळ, मंगळसूत्र, अंगठी, डोरले व कानातील दागिन्यांचा समावेश होता, तसेच नऊ हजार 500 रूपयांची रोख रक्कम चोरून नेल्याचे फिर्यादीत नमूद करण्यात आले आहे. 



सचिन दहिफळे व त्यांची आई घरी परतल्यानंतर घरातील सामान अस्ताव्यस्त पडलेले दिसून आले. तपासणी केली असता कपाटातील सोन्याचे दागिने आणि रोख रक्कम चोरीस गेल्याचे त्यांच्या निदर्शनास आले. दरम्यान, सचिन दहिफळे हे त्यावेळी तोफखाना पोलीस ठाण्यात फिर्याद दाखल करण्यासाठी गेले असता त्यांची फिर्याद दाखल करून घेतली नाही. त्यांनी न्यायालयात धाव घेतली. न्यायालयाने आदेश दिल्यानंतर तोफखाना पोलिसांनी 23 जून 2026 रोजी फिर्याद दाखल करून घेतली आहे. महिला पोलीस अंमलदार खुडे अधिक तपास करीत आहेत.

title: India's active credit cards cross 120 mn in May
Crime News : केडगावमध्ये सामाईक रस्त्याच्या वादातून हाणामारी
description: अहिल्यानगर |प्रतिनिधी| Ahilyanagar केडगाव येथील कोतकर मळा परिसरात सामाईक रस्त्याच्या कारणावरून झालेल्या वादाचे रूपांतर हाणामारीत झाल्याची घटना घडली असून या प्रकरणी कोतवाली पोलिसांनी चौघांविरूध्द बुधवारी (24 जून) गुन्हा दाखल झाला आहे. या मारहाणीत तिघेजण जखमी झाले आहे. याबाबत जखमी सहादू किमन कोतकर (वय 60, रा. कोतकर मळा, केडगाव) यांनी दिलेल्या जबाबावरून गुन्हा नोंद करण्यात आला […]
content:
अहिल्यानगर |प्रतिनिधी| Ahilyanagar



केडगाव येथील कोतकर मळा परिसरात सामाईक रस्त्याच्या कारणावरून झालेल्या वादाचे रूपांतर हाणामारीत झाल्याची घटना घडली असून या प्रकरणी कोतवाली पोलिसांनी चौघांविरूध्द बुधवारी (24 जून) गुन्हा दाखल झाला आहे. या मारहाणीत तिघेजण जखमी झाले आहे.



याबाबत जखमी सहादू किमन कोतकर (वय 60, रा. कोतकर मळा, केडगाव) यांनी दिलेल्या जबाबावरून गुन्हा नोंद करण्यात आला आहे. माऊली ऊर्फ ज्ञानेश्वर कोतकर, ऋतुजा ज्ञानेश्वर कोतकर, सुमन ऊर्फ बबई यादव कोतकर, ऋषीकेश यादव कोतकर (सर्व रा. कोतकर मळा, केडगाव) अशी गुन्हा दाखल झालेल्या संशयित आरोपींची नावे आहेत. 21 जून 2026 रोजी रात्री 10.20 वाजण्याच्या सुमारास कोतकर मळा येथील सामाईक रस्त्यावर हा प्रकार घडला. सहादू कोतकर यांच्या फिर्यादीनुसार, संशयित आरोपींनी चाकूसारखे दिसणारे शस्त्र, दगड आणि लाकडी दांडक्यांचा वापर करून सहादू कोतकर, त्यांची पत्नी नंदा कोतकर आणि मुलगा सागर कोतकर यांना मारहाण केली. 



तसेच लाथाबुक्क्यांनी मारहाण करून दाताने चावा घेत दुखापत केल्याचा आरोप करण्यात आला आहे. यावेळी शिवीगाळ करत तुम्ही येथे कसे राहता तेच पाहतो, अशी धमकीही दिल्याचे फिर्यादीत नमूद करण्यात आले आहे. दरम्यान, या गोंधळात नंदा कोतकर यांच्या गळ्यातील सुमारे 7.50 ग्रॅम वजनाचे सोन्याचे मंगळसूत्र गहाळ झाल्याची फिर्यादीत नमूद करण्यात आले आहे. पोलीस अंमलदार विश्वास गाजरे अधिक तपास करीत आहेत.

title: 77-yr-old 'Water Baba' serves free water in desert
Sangamner : संगमनेरच्या महामार्गावरील ‘ते’ मृत्यूचे सापळे हटणार कधी?
description: संगमनेर |तालुका प्रतिनिधी| Sangamner तालुक्यातील पुणे-नाशिक राष्ट्रीय महामार्ग, कोल्हार-घोटी राज्यमार्ग आणि संगमनेर शहरातून जाणारा जुना नाशिक-पुणे महामार्ग या सर्वच प्रमुख रस्त्याच्या कडेला मोठ-मोठे होर्डिंग उभारण्यात आले आहेत. मात्र, सध्या पावसाळ्याचे दिवस सुरू झाले असून त्यात वादळी वार्‍यामुळे देखील हे होर्डिंग कधीही कोसळण्याची शक्यता निर्माण झाली असून, यामुळे एखादा मोठा अपघात होऊन नागरिकांचा मृत्यू झाल्यास याला […]
content:
संगमनेर |तालुका प्रतिनिधी| Sangamner



तालुक्यातील पुणे-नाशिक राष्ट्रीय महामार्ग, कोल्हार-घोटी राज्यमार्ग आणि संगमनेर शहरातून जाणारा जुना नाशिक-पुणे महामार्ग या सर्वच प्रमुख रस्त्याच्या कडेला मोठ-मोठे होर्डिंग उभारण्यात आले आहेत. मात्र, सध्या पावसाळ्याचे दिवस सुरू झाले असून त्यात वादळी वार्‍यामुळे देखील हे होर्डिंग कधीही कोसळण्याची शक्यता निर्माण झाली असून, यामुळे एखादा मोठा अपघात होऊन नागरिकांचा मृत्यू झाल्यास याला जबाबदार कोण? असा संतप्त प्रश्न आता उपस्थित केला जात आहे.



गेल्या काही महिन्यांत महामार्गांच्या कडेला प्रचंड मोठे लोखंडी सांगाडे उभे करून जाहिरातींचे फलक लावण्याचे पेव फुटले आहे. अनेक ठिकाणी महामार्ग प्राधिकरणाचे नियम धाब्यावर बसवून रस्त्याच्या अगदी कडेला हे होर्डिंग्स लावण्यात आले आहेत. सध्या पावसाळ्याचे दिवस सुरू झाले आहे. तर वारे देखील सुटत आहे. अशा परिस्थितीत हे जड लोखंडी सांगाडे वार्‍याचा वेग सहन करू न शकल्यास थेट रस्त्यावर किंवा जाणार्‍या-येणार्‍या वाहनांवर कोसळण्याचा मोठा धोका निर्माण झाला आहे.



काही महिन्यांपूर्वी मुंबई, पुणे, नाशिक येथील झालेल्या भीषण होर्डिंग दुर्घटनेत अनेकांना आपला जीव गमवावा लागला होता. या घटनेनंतर राज्यभरातील अनधिकृत आणि धोकादायक होर्डिंग्सवर कारवाई करण्याचे आदेश देण्यात आले होते. मात्र, संगमनेर परिसरातील परिस्थिती पाहता स्थानिक प्रशासन आणि राष्ट्रीय महामार्ग प्राधिकरण अजूनही गाढ झोपेत आहे का? असा सवाल नागरिक विचारत आहेत.



दरम्यान, महामार्गावरून रोज हजारो वाहने आणि पादचारी ये-जा करत असतात. वादळात जर एखादे होर्डिंग कोसळले आणि मोठी जीवितहानी झाली, तर स्थानिक ग्रामपंचायत की एजन्सी यापैकी कोण जबाबदारी घेणार? असा जाहीर प्रश्न प्रवाशांकडून विचारला जात आहे. दुर्घटना घडल्यानंतर चौकशीचे नाटक करण्यापेक्षा, दुर्घटना घडण्यापूर्वी प्रशासनाने जागे होण्याची गरज आहे. सर्व प्रमुख मार्गावरील होर्डिंग्सचे तातडीने स्ट्रक्चरल ऑडिट (सुरक्षा तपासणी) करण्यात यावे. नियमबाह्य आणि अनधिकृतपणे उभारलेले होर्डिंग्स तातडीने निष्कासित (काढून) करण्यात यावेत. वादळी वार्‍यासह पावसाच्या पार्श्वभूमीवर धोकादायक फलकांचे फ्लेक्स तातडीने उतरवण्यात यावेत, अशी मागणी होत आहे.
